---
jupyter: python3
format: 
  pdf:
    echo: false
    geometry:
      - top=5mm        
      - left=5mm
      - right=5mm
      - bottom=20mm
      - headheight=35mm 
      - headsep=5mm 
      - includehead=true 
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{tabularx}
          \usepackage{multirow}
          \usepackage{graphicx}
          \usepackage{xcolor}
          \usepackage{fancyhdr}
          \usepackage{lastpage}
          \usepackage{multicol}
          \usepackage{ifthen}

          \pagestyle{fancy}
          \fancyhf{} 
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
          \newcounter{score}
          
          \fancyhead[C]{
            \noindent
            \bgroup
            \def\arraystretch{1.4}
            \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{|p{5.5cm}|p{1.8cm}|X|p{1.2cm}|p{1.8cm}|}
            \hline
            \multirow{5}{5.5cm}{
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \includegraphics[width=4.5cm]{logo} \\
                \fontsize{6pt}{7pt}\selectfont
                \textbf{CIVIL \& ENVIRONMENTAL ENGINEERING,}\\
                SKEMPTON BUILDING, IMPERIAL COLLEGE\\
                LONDON, SOUTH KENSINGTON CAMPUS,\\
                LONDON SW7 2AZ.\\[3mm]
                \normalsize\textbf{CALCULATION SHEET}
            }
            & \textbf{Job No.} & & \textbf{Sheet} & \textbf{Ref} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \textbf{Job Title} & Steel Design Coursework & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\thepage\ of \pageref{LastPage}} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multicolumn{4}{p{\dimexpr\textwidth-5.5cm-8\tabcolsep-5\arrayrulewidth\relax}|}{
                \textbf{Subject} \newline
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \centerline{ NS Bracing LC4 - Lateral Deflection Calculation }
                \vspace*{1mm}
            } \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Client}} & \textbf{Made by} \quad  Pablo Peng & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date} \quad 03/03/2026} \\ \cline{3-5}
            & & \textbf{Checked by} \quad  Vincent Chan & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date}} \\ \hline
            \end{tabularx}
            \egroup
          }
---
\Large 
\linespread{1.4}
\selectfont

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from pathlib import Path

scheme = 'A'

if scheme == 'A':
    model = pd.read_excel('model_a.xlsx')
    
elif scheme == 'B':
    model = pd.read_excel('model_b.xlsx')
    
typey = 'Y'
LC1y = '1.35Gk + 1.50Qk + 0.75WkY + EHF'
LC2y = '1.35Gk + 1.05Qk + 1.50WkY + EHF'
LC3y = '1.0Gk + 1.50WkY + EHF'
LC4y = '1.35Gk + 1.50Qk +EHF'

typex = 'X'
LC1x = '1.35Gk + 1.50Qk + 0.75WkX + EHF'
LC2x = '1.35Gk + 1.05Qk + 1.50WkX + EHF'
LC3x = '1.0Gk + 1.50WkX + EHF'
LC4x = '1.35Gk + 1.50Qk +EHF'

def data_prep(df, LC1, LC2, LC3, LC4):
    df1 = df[(df['Output Case'] == LC1)]
    df2 = df[(df['Output Case'] == LC2)]
    df3 = df[(df['Output Case'] == LC3)]
    df4 = df[(df['Output Case'] == LC4)]
    df_dict = {'LC1': df1,'LC2': df2,'LC3': df3,'LC4': df4}
    return df_dict

def deflection_plot(df_dict, type):
    plt.rcParams['font.family'] = 'Times New Roman'
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 5))
    for key in df_dict.keys():
        df = df_dict[key].sort_values('Z', ascending=True)
        ax.plot(-df['UX'], df['Z'], label=f'Etabs Results - {key}')
    ax.set_xlabel('Total Deflection (mm)')
    ax.set_ylabel('Storey Height (m)')
    if type == 'X':  
        ax.set_title('Deflection vs Storey Height in West-East Direction')      
    elif type == 'Y':
        ax.set_title('Deflection vs Storey Height in North-South Direction')
      
    ax.grid(linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)
    plt.legend()
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()
```

#
```{python}
# Deflection plots
dfy = data_prep(model, LC1y, LC2y, LC3y, LC4y)
deflection_plot(dfy, typey)
```

# Summary table for deflection values in the North-South direction

```{python}
#| output: asis

# Deflection table, storey values run horizontally to the right.
storey_heights = np.array(dfy['LC1']['Z'].to_list())
cols = ['Storey Height (m)'] + [f"{int(s)}" for s in storey_heights]
table_horizontal = pd.DataFrame([
    ['LC1 Deflection (mm)'] + [f"{-d:.2f}" for d in dfy['LC1']['UX'].to_list()],
    ['LC2 Deflection (mm)'] + [f"{-d:.2f}" for d in dfy['LC2']['UX'].to_list()],
    ['LC3 Deflection (mm)'] + [f"{-d:.2f}" for d in dfy['LC3']['UX'].to_list()],
    ['LC4 Deflection (mm)'] + [f"{-d:.2f}" for d in dfy['LC4']['UX'].to_list()]], columns=cols)

latex_table = table_horizontal.to_latex(index=False,escape=False,column_format='|l|' + 'c|' * len(storey_heights))

print(r"\normalfont")
print(r"\setlength{\tabcolsep}{7pt}")
print(latex_table)
```

{{< pagebreak >}}

#
```{python}
dfx = data_prep(model, LC1x, LC2x, LC3x, LC4x)
deflection_plot(dfx, typex)
```

# Summary table for deflection values in the West-East direction

```{python}
#| output: asis

# Deflection table, storey values run horizontally to the right.
storey_heights = np.array(dfx['LC1']['Z'].to_list())
cols = ['Storey Height (m)'] + [f"{int(s)}" for s in storey_heights]
table_horizontal = pd.DataFrame([
    ['LC1 Deflection (mm)'] + [f"{-d:.2f}" for d in dfx['LC1']['UX'].to_list()],
    ['LC2 Deflection (mm)'] + [f"{-d:.2f}" for d in dfx['LC2']['UX'].to_list()],
    ['LC3 Deflection (mm)'] + [f"{-d:.2f}" for d in dfx['LC3']['UX'].to_list()],
    ['LC4 Deflection (mm)'] + [f"{-d:.2f}" for d in dfx['LC4']['UX'].to_list()]], columns=cols)

latex_table = table_horizontal.to_latex(index=False,escape=False,column_format='|l|' + 'c|' * len(storey_heights))

print(r"\normalfont")
print(r"\setlength{\tabcolsep}{7pt}")
print(latex_table)
```
